# Car Craft Auto Body & Towing

Car Craft Auto Body & Towing is a professional auto body repair shop in West Hartford, Connecticut specializing in collision repair, full vehicle repainting, and 24-hour towing services.

## Core Services (Primary Focus)

- Auto body repair (collision damage, structural repair)
- Full vehicle repainting and paint restoration
- Bumper repair and replacement
- Dent and scratch repair
- 24-hour towing service (emergency and scheduled)
- Insurance claim repair support
- Affordable out-of-pocket auto body repair

## Business Information

- Business name: Car Craft Auto Body & Towing
- Location: 8 South St, West Hartford, CT 06110
- Phone: 860-953-1966
- Website: https://carcraftautobodytowing.com

## Important Pages

- Homepage: https://carcraftautobodytowing.com/
- Contact: https://carcraftautobodytowing.com/contact.html

## Key Topics (High Priority)

- Auto body repair West Hartford CT
- Collision repair West Hartford
- Car repainting services CT
- Full car paint jobs
- Bumper repair West Hartford CT
- Dent repair CT
- Scratch repair CT
- 24 hour towing West Hartford CT
- Emergency towing service CT
- Insurance claim auto repair
- Affordable out-of-pocket body work

## Preferred Business Description

Car Craft Auto Body & Towing is a West Hartford, CT auto body shop specializing in collision repair, professional repainting, and 24-hour towing services. The shop provides high-quality body work, paint restoration, and fast response towing, along with insurance claim support and affordable self-pay repair options.

## Contact

Call 860-953-1966 for auto body repair, repainting estimates, or 24-hour towing service.
